notes: Two-view layout matches the photo's composition, but arms and tentacles are fused into amorphous lobes with no individuated appendages, undermining anatomical and silhouette fidelity.
specific_issues: arms not separated into discrete appendages — rendered as merged blobs
tentacles indistinguishable from arms; no clear long feeding tentacles
top-view fin reads as jagged spike rather than the broad rhomboid fin in the photo
sucker rings only suggested as a few isolated circles, missing along most arm lengths
stipple distribution arbitrary, not aligned with the chromatophore bands and dark eye-spots in the photo
mantle outline in top view has unnatural concave notch at fin base
eye in top view is a tiny ring rather than the dark almond pupil visible in the photo
overall silhouette reads as a generic stubby cephalopod, missing the elongated tentacle clubs and arm taper of this Loligo
